name: Shih Wei Navigation Co., Ltd.
summary: Shih Wei Navigation Co., Ltd. operates as a dry cargo shipping company in Taiwan. It engages in the shipping transportation, shipping agency, and ship management and chartering, as well as ship sale and purchase activities. The company trades in various types of bulk cargo, such as steel products, ores, etc., as well as equipment, wooden cargos, wood pulps, general cargos, and logs. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.
